creator: dirk@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi!

Funny! I have something very similar in my commit queue.

This was held back because I'm not happy with the idea of committing
an "alpha" version of cdrtools so short before a release.

I'd like to wait a bit and see what's evolving with cdrtools...
Perhaps we have 1.11 before the release.

	Regards Dirk

-- 
Dirk Froemberg

FreeBSD: The Power to Serve!		http://www.FreeBSD.org/
